title: Datadog Q4 2025 Earnings Preview: Revenue Forecast & Analyst Price Target
text: Datadog Q4 2025 Earnings Preview Summary. Recent Performance Q3 2025: Datadog exceeded revenue expectations by 3.9 percent reporting 885.7 million in quarterly revenues with 28.4 percent year-over-year growth. The company added 210 enterprise customers with annual contracts exceeding 100,000 reaching a total of 4,060 such customers. Q4 2025 Analyst Expectations: Analysts project revenue to grow 24.5 percent year on year to 918.2 million with adjusted earnings of 0.55 per share. The company has consistently surpassed revenue estimates over the past two years averaging 3.6 percent above expectations. Market Context: Datadog stock has declined 11.5 percent over the past month underperforming the broader software development sector which is down 18.8 percent on average. The company trades at 111.91 substantially below the average analyst price target of 191.39. Competitive Landscape: Among peers F5 recently reported results beating revenue estimates by 8.8 percent with modest 7.3 percent year-over-year growth. Market uncertainty stems from potential trade policy changes and corporate tax discussions affecting the sector outlook.
